You are running as a single automated phase of the ADW pipeline.
The orchestrator performs ALL git and GitHub work for this run: do NOT run git or gh, do NOT create/switch/commit/push branches, and do NOT open, merge, or comment on pull requests. If the task section below tells you to do any of that, skip those steps.
You have no GitHub access in this phase; all issue context you need is provided inline.

---

Classify work item #5 into a single change type for branch naming and commit prefixing.

Work item context (title, body, labels):

5 GitHub issue #5: refactor: split parity-rate classification from rendering
Labels: issue_class:refactor adw-live-batch

Part of the MVP live-run batch (`adw_sdlc/docs/LIVE-RUN-BATCH.md`). Intended `issue_class`: **refactor**. Planned ADW run mode: native.

## Goal
Separate `tools/parity-rate.ts` classification logic from its terminal rendering so the classifier can be unit-tested and reused without printing.

## Scope
- Extract pure functions (per-phase classification, rate aggregation, verdict) from the I/O/printing layer in `adw_sdlc/tools/parity-rate.ts`.
- Keep the CLI entry behavior and output byte-stable.
- Extend `test/parity-rate.test.ts` to call the extracted functions directly.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] No behavior change to `npm run parity:rate` output for the same inputs.
- [ ] Classification/verdict functions are exported and unit-tested.
- [ ] `npm run verify` stays green.

## Notes
Behavior-preserving refactor; the drift-guard test (`FENCED_MARKER`) must stay intact.

## Instructions

- Choose exactly one `issue_class` from: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `chore`, `ci`, `test`, `refactor`.
  - `feat` — new user-visible feature or capability.
  - `fix` — bug fix or correctness change.
  - `docs` — documentation-only change.
  - `chore` — maintenance, deps, tooling with no user-visible behavior change.
  - `ci` — CI/build/workflow change.
  - `test` — test-only change.
  - `refactor` — internal restructuring with no behavior change.
- Prefer the narrowest truthful classification.
- If labels and body disagree, classify by the actual requested change.
